enums.name: EndpointStatus
enums.doc: The status of the endpoint. If the endpoint is Enabled, it is probed for endpoint health and is included in the traffic routing method.

enums.name: EndpointMonitorStatus
enums.doc: The monitoring status of the endpoint.

enums.name: TrafficManagerEndpointAlwaysServeStatus
enums.doc: If Always Serve is enabled, probing for endpoint health will be disabled and endpoints will be included in the traffic routing method.

enums.name: createdByType

values.name: User
values.doc: The entity was created by a user.

values.name: Application
values.doc: The entity was created by an application.

values.name: ManagedIdentity
values.doc: The entity was created by a managed identity.

values.name: Key
values.doc: The entity was created by a key.

enums.doc: The kind of entity that created the resource.

enums.name: ProfileStatus
enums.doc: The status of the Traffic Manager profile.

enums.name: TrafficRoutingMethod
enums.doc: The traffic routing method of the Traffic Manager profile.

enums.name: ProfileMonitorStatus
enums.doc: The profile-level monitoring status of the Traffic Manager profile.

enums.name: MonitorProtocol
enums.doc: The protocol (HTTP, HTTPS or TCP) used to probe for endpoint health.

enums.name: TrafficViewEnrollmentStatus
enums.doc: Indicates whether Traffic View is 'Enabled' or 'Disabled' for the Traffic Manager profile. Null, indicates 'Disabled'. Enabling this feature will increase the cost of the Traffic Manage profile.

enums.name: AllowedEndpointRecordType
enums.doc: The allowed type DNS record types for this profile.

models.name: Endpoint
models.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager endpoint.

baseModel.name: TrafficManagerProxyResourceData
baseModel.doc: The resource model definition for a ARM proxy resource. It will have everything other than required location and tags

baseModel.name: TrafficManagerResourceData
baseModel.doc: The core properties of ARM resources

properties.name: id
properties.doc: Fully qualified resource Id for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficManagerProfiles/{resourceName}

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the resource

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the resource. Ex- Microsoft.Network/trafficManagerProfiles.

properties.name: systemData
properties.doc: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

type.name: SystemData
type.doc: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.doc: The identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource creation (UTC).

properties.name: lastModifiedBy
properties.doc: The identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: The properties of the Traffic Manager endpoint.

type.name: EndpointProperties
type.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager endpoint properties.

properties.name: targetResourceId
properties.doc: The Azure Resource URI of the of the endpoint. Not applicable to endpoints of type 'ExternalEndpoints'.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The fully-qualified DNS name or IP address of the endpoint. Traffic Manager returns this value in DNS responses to direct traffic to this endpoint.

properties.name: endpointStatus
properties.doc: The status of the endpoint. If the endpoint is Enabled, it is probed for endpoint health and is included in the traffic routing method.

properties.name: weight
properties.doc: The weight of this endpoint when using the 'Weighted' traffic routing method. Possible values are from 1 to 1000.

properties.name: priority
properties.doc: The priority of this endpoint when using the 'Priority' traffic routing method. Possible values are from 1 to 1000, lower values represent higher priority. This is an optional parameter.  If specified, it must be specified on all endpoints, and no two endpoints can share the same priority value.

properties.name: endpointLocation
properties.doc: Specifies the location of the external or nested endpoints when using the 'Performance' traffic routing method.

properties.name: endpointMonitorStatus
properties.doc: The monitoring status of the endpoint.

properties.name: minChildEndpoints
properties.doc: The minimum number of endpoints that must be available in the child profile in order for the parent profile to be considered available. Only applicable to endpoint of type 'NestedEndpoints'.

properties.name: minChildEndpointsIPv4
properties.doc: The minimum number of IPv4 (DNS record type A) endpoints that must be available in the child profile in order for the parent profile to be considered available. Only applicable to endpoint of type 'NestedEndpoints'.

properties.name: minChildEndpointsIPv6
properties.doc: The minimum number of IPv6 (DNS record type AAAA) endpoints that must be available in the child profile in order for the parent profile to be considered available. Only applicable to endpoint of type 'NestedEndpoints'.

properties.name: geoMapping
properties.doc: The list of countries/regions mapped to this endpoint when using the 'Geographic' traffic routing method. Please consult Traffic Manager Geographic documentation for a full list of accepted values.

properties.name: subnets
properties.doc: The list of subnets, IP addresses, and/or address ranges mapped to this endpoint when using the 'Subnet' traffic routing method. An empty list will match all ranges not covered by other endpoints.

valueType.name: TrafficManagerEndpointSubnetInfo
valueType.doc: Subnet first address, scope, and/or last address.

properties.name: first
properties.doc: First address in the subnet.

properties.name: last
properties.doc: Last address in the subnet.

properties.name: scope
properties.doc: Block size (number of leading bits in the subnet mask).

properties.name: customHeaders
properties.doc: List of custom headers.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Header name.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: Header value.

properties.name: alwaysServe
properties.doc: If Always Serve is enabled, probing for endpoint health will be disabled and endpoints will be included in the traffic routing method.

models.name: CloudError
models.doc: An error returned by the Azure Resource Manager

properties.name: error
properties.doc: The content of the error.

type.name: CloudErrorBody
type.doc: The content of an error returned by the Azure Resource Manager

properties.name: code
properties.doc: Error code

properties.name: message
properties.doc: Error message

properties.name: target
properties.doc: Error target

properties.name: details
properties.doc: Error details

models.name: DeleteOperationResult
models.doc: The result of the request or operation.

properties.name: operationResult
properties.doc: The result of the operation or request.

models.name: Profile
models.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager profile.

baseModel.name: TrafficManagerTrackedResourceData
baseModel.doc: The resource model definition for a ARM tracked top level resource

properties.name: tags
properties.doc: Resource tags.

properties.name: location
properties.doc: The Azure Region where the resource lives

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: The properties of the Traffic Manager profile.

type.name: ProfileProperties
type.doc: Class representing the Traffic Manager profile properties.

properties.name: profileStatus
properties.doc: The status of the Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: trafficRoutingMethod
properties.doc: The traffic routing method of the Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: dnsConfig
properties.doc: The DNS settings of the Traffic Manager profile.

type.name: DnsConfig
type.doc: Class containing DNS settings in a Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: relativeName
properties.doc: The relative DNS name provided by this Traffic Manager profile. This value is combined with the DNS domain name used by Azure Traffic Manager to form the fully-qualified domain name (FQDN) of the profile.

properties.name: fqdn
properties.doc: The fully-qualified domain name (FQDN) of the Traffic Manager profile. This is formed from the concatenation of the RelativeName with the DNS domain used by Azure Traffic Manager.

properties.name: ttl
properties.doc: The DNS Time-To-Live (TTL), in seconds. This informs the local DNS resolvers and DNS clients how long to cache DNS responses provided by this Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: monitorConfig
properties.doc: The endpoint monitoring settings of the Traffic Manager profile.

type.name: MonitorConfig
type.doc: Class containing endpoint monitoring settings in a Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: profileMonitorStatus
properties.doc: The profile-level monitoring status of the Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: protocol
properties.doc: The protocol (HTTP, HTTPS or TCP) used to probe for endpoint health.

properties.name: port
properties.doc: The TCP port used to probe for endpoint health.

properties.name: path
properties.doc: The path relative to the endpoint domain name used to probe for endpoint health.

properties.name: intervalInSeconds
properties.doc: The monitor interval for endpoints in this profile. This is the interval at which Traffic Manager will check the health of each endpoint in this profile.

properties.name: timeoutInSeconds
properties.doc: The monitor timeout for endpoints in this profile. This is the time that Traffic Manager allows endpoints in this profile to response to the health check.

properties.name: toleratedNumberOfFailures
properties.doc: The number of consecutive failed health check that Traffic Manager tolerates before declaring an endpoint in this profile Degraded after the next failed health check.

properties.name: customHeaders
properties.doc: List of custom headers.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Header name.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: Header value.

properties.name: expectedStatusCodeRanges
properties.doc: List of expected status code ranges.

valueType.name: ExpectedStatusCodeRangeInfo
valueType.doc: Min and max value of a status code range.

properties.name: min
properties.doc: Min status code.

properties.name: max
properties.doc: Max status code.

properties.name: endpoints
properties.doc: The list of endpoints in the Traffic Manager profile.

properties.name: trafficViewEnrollmentStatus
properties.doc: Indicates whether Traffic View is 'Enabled' or 'Disabled' for the Traffic Manager profile. Null, indicates 'Disabled'. Enabling this feature will increase the cost of the Traffic Manage profile.

properties.name: allowedEndpointRecordTypes
properties.doc: The list of allowed endpoint record types.

properties.name: maxReturn
properties.doc: Maximum number of endpoints to be returned for MultiValue routing type.

models.name: ProfileListResult
models.doc: The response of a Profile list operation.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The Profile items on this page

properties.name: nextLink
properties.doc: The link to the next page of items

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The relative name.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: Traffic Manager profile resource type.

properties.name: IsNameAvailable
properties.doc: Describes whether the relative name is available or not.

properties.name: UnavailableReason
properties.doc: The reason why the name is not available, when applicable.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: Descriptive message that explains why the name is not available, when applicable.

properties.doc: The properties of the Geographic Hierarchy resource.

properties.name: geographicHierarchy
properties.doc: The region at the root of the hierarchy from all the regions in the hierarchy can be retrieved.

type.name: Region
type.doc: Class representing a region in the Geographic hierarchy used with the Geographic traffic routing method.

models.name: TrafficManagerHeatMap
models.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager HeatMap.

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: The properties of the Traffic Manager HeatMap.

type.name: HeatMapProperties
type.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager HeatMap properties.

properties.name: startTime
properties.doc: The beginning of the time window for this HeatMap, inclusive.

properties.name: endTime
properties.doc: The ending of the time window for this HeatMap, exclusive.

properties.name: endpoints
properties.doc: The endpoints used in this HeatMap calculation.

valueType.name: HeatMapEndpoint
valueType.doc: Class which is a sparse representation of a Traffic Manager endpoint.

properties.name: resourceId
properties.doc: The ARM Resource ID of this Traffic Manager endpoint.

properties.name: endpointId
properties.doc: A number uniquely identifying this endpoint in query experiences.

properties.name: trafficFlows
properties.doc: The traffic flows produced in this HeatMap calculation.

valueType.name: TrafficManagerHeatMapTrafficFlow
valueType.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager HeatMap traffic flow properties.

properties.name: sourceIp
properties.doc: The IP address that this query experience originated from.

properties.name: latitude
properties.doc: The approximate latitude that these queries originated from.

properties.name: longitude
properties.doc: The approximate longitude that these queries originated from.

properties.name: queryExperiences
properties.doc: The query experiences produced in this HeatMap calculation.

valueType.name: TrafficManagerHeatMapQueryExperience
valueType.doc: Class representing a Traffic Manager HeatMap query experience properties.

properties.name: endpointId
properties.doc: The id of the endpoint from the 'endpoints' array which these queries were routed to.

properties.name: queryCount
properties.doc: The number of queries originating from this location.

properties.name: latency
properties.doc: The latency experienced by queries originating from this location.
